prediction.reasoning: Based on historical volatility patterns for PANW (typically 25-35% annualized), a 7-day forecast assumes moderate upward momentum given cybersecurity sector strength. The point estimate reflects slight positive drift with widening confidence intervals to account for increased uncertainty over the 7-day horizon. Intervals are constructed using approximately 1.2% daily volatility with appropriate z-scores for each confidence level.
